claim: Chatbots give up, but agents improvise and solve problems through unexpected approaches
actionable: Design agents with persistence and problem-solving capabilities rather than fixed decision trees

claim: The bottleneck in software development has shifted from typing to thinking
actionable: Focus effort on system design and problem formulation rather than code generation

claim: OpenClaw agents can accomplish tasks autonomously including handling resilience and bootstrapping
actionable: Deploy OpenClaw agents on dedicated machines with persistent uptime for autonomous task execution
